query: Can you create a one-week travel itinerary for two people departing from Myrtle Beach and covering three cities in Michigan between March 4th and March 10th, 2022? Our budget is set at $8,300. We would like to experience both French and American cuisines during our journey. We will require accommodations, though we have no specific house rules in mind.

plan.transportation: Flight F3623834 from Myrtle Beach to Detroit
plan.attraction: Detroit Institute of Arts;Campus Martius Park;Motown Museum;
plan.accommodation: Comfy King Bed Feet from Subway, Detroit

plan.attraction: Detroit Riverwalk;Henry Ford Museum of American Innovation;Detroit Zoo;
plan.accommodation: Comfy King Bed Feet from Subway, Detroit

plan.attraction: Impression 5 Science Center;Potter Park Zoo;Eli and Edythe Broad Art Museum;
plan.accommodation: Magical Brooklyn Space *20 MIN to Manhattan!*, Lansing

plan.attraction: Fenner Nature Center;Adado Riverfront Park;Michigan History Center;
plan.accommodation: Magical Brooklyn Space *20 MIN to Manhattan!*, Lansing

plan.attraction: Kalamazoo Valley Museum;Kalamazoo Institute of Arts;Air Zoo Aerospace & Science Museum;
plan.accommodation: Spacious & Quaint 1 Bed in Midtown, Kalamazoo

plan.attraction: Kalamazoo Nature Center;Milham Park;Asylum Lake Preserve;
plan.accommodation: Spacious & Quaint 1 Bed in Midtown, Kalamazoo

plan.transportation: Self-driving from Kalamazoo to Myrtle Beach
